gist.headline: Fresh ink in the README
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just swept through and updated the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page fresh with the latest community highlights and project updates.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a librarian or archivist, organizing a giant pixelated book or scroll (the README) alongside the monitor robot printing out the latest news.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, organizing a giant glowing pixelated book. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head is printing out fresh news scrolls. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, organizing a giant glowing pixelated book.
